channel.title: TimeHopper Blog
channel.description: Effortless Time Zone Management for Distributed Teams

item.title: Add Time Zone to Google Calendar: Options + Best Workarounds
item.description: How to add and display time zones in Google Calendar: secondary time zones, event time zones, and practical workarounds for remote teams.

item.title: Best Google Calendar Extensions (2026): Quick View, Alerts, and Time Zones
item.description: A category-based guide to Google Calendar extensions: quick-view, meeting alerts, time zones, and ‘no-surprises’ trust signals—so you pick the right one fast.

item.title: Google Calendar Add-ons vs Chrome Extensions: What’s the Difference?
item.description: Google Calendar add-ons and Chrome extensions solve different problems. Here’s the practical difference, what each can do, and which to choose for quick view, alerts, and time zones.

item.title: Google Calendar Desktop Notifications Not Working (Chrome / Mac / Windows)
item.description: Desktop notifications can fail due to Chrome permissions, OS focus modes, and background restrictions. Here’s a platform-by-platform fix guide.

item.title: Chrome Extension for Google Calendar: See Your Schedule Without Switching Tabs
item.description: A practical guide to using a Chrome extension to view your Google Calendar instantly—plus what to look for so it stays fast, reliable, and trustworthy.

item.title: Google Calendar Notification Not Working? 9 Fixes That Actually Work
item.description: If Google Calendar notifications aren’t showing up, these 9 fixes solve most cases—Chrome settings, OS focus modes, permissions, and common edge cases.

item.title: Google Calendar Reminders Not Working? Fixes + a Redundancy Plan
item.description: If Google Calendar reminders aren’t firing, work through this checklist—and set up a redundancy plan so you don’t miss important meetings.

item.title: Google Calendar Time Zone Confusion: Why Meetings “Move” When You Travel
item.description: Meetings don’t actually move—your display and event time zones do. Here’s how Google Calendar time zones work, why travel causes confusion, and how to prevent it.

item.title: Time Zone in Google Calendar: What It Controls vs What It Doesn’t
item.description: A clear explanation of Google Calendar time zones: display vs event time zone, what changes when you travel, and what settings actually control.

item.title: Google Calendar Time Zone Wrong? Fix It Fast (5 Common Causes)
item.description: If Google Calendar is showing the wrong time zone (or meetings look shifted), these 5 causes solve most cases—plus a quick prevention checklist.

item.title: How to Change Time Zone in Google Calendar (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Change your display time zone, event time zone, and default settings in Google Calendar—plus the common mistakes that cause meetings to appear at the wrong time.

item.title: How to Mastering Time Zones for Your Remote Team
item.description: Coordinate effortlessly across continents. Learn the best practices for managing distributed teams without the scheduling headache.

item.title: Multiple Time Zones in One View: A Labeling System Your Team Will Actually Use
item.description: A simple system for tracking multiple time zones without confusion: pick team zones, label them consistently, and stop time math mistakes.

item.title: Time Zone Converter for Meetings: Convert Times Without Mental Math
item.description: A practical way to convert meeting times across time zones (including DST), plus a simple system that prevents the most common scheduling mistakes.

item.title: UTC to Eastern / Pacific: A Quick Conversion Cheat Sheet (Plus DST Notes)
item.description: A simple UTC conversion cheat sheet for Eastern and Pacific time, with practical DST guidance so you don’t get burned during transition weeks.

item.title: World Clock + Google Calendar: The Fastest Setup for Remote Teams
item.description: A simple setup to stop time-zone mistakes: add a secondary time zone, keep a world clock visible, and use a quick calendar peek in your toolbar.
